Notice And Motion To Strike Portions Of Pltf'S Complaint
Off Calendar Jun-02-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANTS AUGUST LEITE AND MARIA LACAYO'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

APPEARANCES: Eric Tosaris, Esq. 292-1450 for pltf & opposing party; Hunter W. Sims, III, Esq. of Valerian, Patterson & Stratman 510/521-0612 for defts & moving parties.

RULING: Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO STRIKE PRAYER FOR PUNITIVE DAMAGES IS DENIED. SEE TAYLOR V. SUP. CRT., (1979) 24 CAL.3D 890. (PREVAILING PARTY TO PREPARE ORDER.) (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Carlito Mandia, CSR 689

PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE

MINI MINUTES: No appearance. Plaintiff's counsel is sanctioned $200.00, for failure to appear. The OSC is ordered off calendar. Proceedings not reported. (610)
